Welcome to my website. My name is Yap Jia Hong, and I am a student in university studying in a diploma course on software engineering. Then I’ll probably switch to a degree in computer science. If you would like to know more about me take a look at the about page.

Active projects

Here you can see the number of projects I have active.

  1. rlox, a clone of the lox programming language but written in Rust hence the ‘r’ prefix before ‘lox’.
  2. Kalculator. It’s a calculator. The same knowledge needed to create a programming language is also needed in making a calculator, I thought why not kill two birds with one shot.

Ideas

Here you’ll look at my project ideas, basically what I want to create in the future.

  1. A vim/neovim clone, but with only the basic features. Basic text editing, moving around with ‘hjkl’, etc.
  2. Creating a music discord bot. I currently have a discord bot that can play music, but it’s very ineffective. And I might need to refactor the entire song playback feature.
